title: Xterminate UV LED Wall Mounted Fly Zapper Killer Unit 20W Equivalent to 40W Electric for Capturing Flies, Moths, Mosquitoes and Flying Insects, for Restaurants, Kitchens, Schools, Cafes (Large)
bullet_points: Powerful Commercial Fly Killer – High-voltage electric grid delivers an instant kill on contact, eliminating flies, mosquitoes, wasps, and other flying insects quickly and hygienically in busy environments
Advanced Dual UV Attraction – Equipped with two 10W energy-saving LED tubes (365nm & 395nm), providing the attraction power of a 40W unit to maximise insect capture rates
Wide Coverage up to 100m² – Designed for large spaces including restaurants, warehouses, kitchens, cafés, schools, caravans, and summerhouses for complete indoor protection
Flexible Installation Options – Freestanding, wall-mounted, or ceiling-hung design with fixings and hanging chain included for versatile placement
Industrial-Strength Construction – Built from heavy-duty steel with durable ABS sides, ensuring long-lasting performance in demanding commercial settings
Safe Enclosed Design – The protective outer mesh prevents accidental contact, making it ideal for use in food preparation areas and customer-facing environments
Energy Efficient & Long-Lasting – Low energy consumption (18W rated power) with LED bulbs offering over 10,000 hours of lifespan for reduced running costs
Easy to Clean & Maintain – Removable collection tray and included cleaning brush allow for quick, hygienic maintenance with minimal effort
Rust-Resistant & Reliable – Designed to withstand continuous use with corrosion-resistant materials for dependable, long-term operation
Complete Feature Package – Includes 1.5m power cable, replaceable T8 LED tubes, wall fixings, and compact dimensions (64cm x 26cm x 7.5cm) for practical everyday use
